title: Leptocladodia microheliopsis
taxonomy: Leptocladodia microheliopsis belongs to the family Leptodontaceae, which is a part of the class Bryopsida, an order of mosses. Further classification places Leptocladodia microheliopsis in the subclass Bryidae, within the division Bryophyta, a group of non-vascular plants. The class Bryopsida is a large group of mosses that includes many species of mosses found in various parts of the world. The family Leptodontaceae, to which Leptocladodia microheliopsis belongs, is a relatively small family of mosses primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Leptocladodia microheliopsis reflects its evolutionary relationships with other mosses.
